instruction: Summarize the CVE description using precise cybersecurity language.
input: Insufficient input validation in SVC_ECC_PRIMITIVE system call in a compromised user application or ABL may allow an attacker to corrupt ASP (AMD Secure Processor) OS memory which may lead to potential loss of integrity and availability.
output: The issue is insufficient input validation in the SVC_ECC_PRIMITIVE system call, which can allow an attacker to corrupt the memory of the AMD Secure Processor (ASP) operating system, potentially impacting integrity and availability.
